seriess.title: Currency Component of M1 Plus Demand Deposits (DISCONTINUED)
seriess.notes:
Calculated by the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis.

As of August 27, 2024, updates for this series have ceased. The series can still be calculated by adding CURRSL (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/CURRSL) and DEMDEPSL (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DEMDEPSL). The discontinued series plotted on the same graph with the calculated data can be accessed for comparison here (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/graph/?g=1x2wP).
